tg.tg_note: rates [25,50,100]->[408.6,515.3,369.9] scattered; single_rate_fallback r25. PMMA raw Tg STRADDLES exp (340-408 K across replicates); scattered, not a clean systematic.

density.density_note: FAIL -6.7% vs exp 1.19. ANOMALOUS: ~4% below the class's own PCFF benchmark (Tang2022 within 2%), systematic across all 4 replicates. Cells ARE equilibrated (plateau converged, drift<0.2%, sem<0.03%) -> NOT under-equilibration; a build/cell-quality concern (charges/tacticity/DP). Low density + high K is physically incoherent -> lowers confidence across the whole PMMA set.

bulk_modulus.method_note: Murnaghan 4.4576 graded FAIL-HIGH vs K_T [3.5,4.2], but this is a K_T/K_S methodology gap: the MD value sits INSIDE the K_S-derived [4.3,5.4] (ultrasonic) and exceeds only direct-PVT K_T (graded under polymer_rules K_T-priority). NOT a gross sim overestimate; narrow-window B0'=10.54 also inflates. No property passes cleanly for PMMA (weakest/lowest-confidence set).

provenance.review_note: PMMA replicate cross-check 2026-06-28: WEAKEST set, no property passes cleanly. Density FAIL x4 anomalous (-6%, below PCFF benchmark -> build/cell-quality concern). Tg scattered straddle (PMMA3 PASS is fast-rate coincidence). K FAIL-high vs K_T (K_T/K_S gap). PMMA2 468-style false slope-gate killed; PMMA1 degenerate.
